creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Tue, Feb 19, 2008 at 06:29:36PM +0300, Roman Kurakin wrote:
 > We've tested patch with Eygene on my HP 6910p and 6.3 Release amd64.
 > It seems it works fine, but after patching psm(4) (else system doesn't wan't
 > to detect my touchpad as synaptics device).
 
 For the record: PR is at http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=120783
 if someone has HP notebook with Synaptics touchpad and the device
 is not recognized by psm(4) driver as Synaptics, but rather is
 thought to be IntelliMouse ;))
 
 Roman, thank you! :)
 -- 
 Eygene
